css-base demos

@medyll/css-base — Skin Demos

10 demos proving css-base works as a skinnable design system. Each uses only app.css + a skin.css variable override file.

NetflixDark

Hero banner, card carousels, dark UI with red accent.
AmazonE-commerce

Product grid, search bar, filters, deal banners.
WhatsAppMessaging

Contact list, chat bubbles, green accent.
Windows 11Desktop

Taskbar, start menu, windows, Mica blur.
macOSDesktop

Menu bar, dock, Finder windows, traffic lights.
SpotifyMusic

Playlist sidebar, album grid, player bar.
SlackWorkspace

Aubergine sidebar, channels, message threads.
GitHubDev

Repo page, file tree, issues, README panel.
DashboardAnalytics

KPI cards, charts, data tables, sidebar nav.
TerminalCLI

Command prompt, file manager, system monitor.
